# agent-loop

> A minimal, local, self-improving pair-programming loop: one Python file
> (zero dependencies) that learns your coding-style corrections permanently
> via a file-based memory — no accounts, no cloud, no telemetry.

The core (`loop.py`, stdlib-only) polls a human-owned Markdown file and
suggests one-line micro-steps in an agent-owned file. Corrections typed as
`!fix a => b` become prompt rules and Alpaca-shaped training rows in
`preferences.jsonl`. Everything else — reflex completions, test harness,
future fine-tuning — is an optional separate process speaking the same file
protocol (`docs/PROTOCOL.md`). Requires a local Ollama server.

## Facts (agent-verifiable)

- Zero runtime dependencies; single core file ≤ 300 lines: `grep -E "^import |^from " loop.py`
- Network access limited to `localhost:11434` (Ollama): `grep -n "http" loop.py`
- No shell/subprocess/eval of model output: `grep -nE "subprocess|os\.system|eval\(|exec\(" loop.py`
- Tested with a real local model + deterministic fake; evidence in `SESSION_REPORT.md` and `session-logs/`

## Docs

- [User Guide](docs/USER_GUIDE.md): install, quickstart, command reference, personas, troubleshooting, FAQ
- [Developer Guide](docs/DEVELOPER_GUIDE.md): architecture, code walkthrough, design rationale, testing, writing extras, security model
- [File Protocol v1](docs/PROTOCOL.md): the normative module API — files, invariants, command grammar, memory schema
- [Agent Guide](AGENTS.md): verification table, evaluation guidance, rules for agents working in this repo
- [Session Report](SESSION_REPORT.md): live-fire test results, bugs found and fixed, limitations

## Optional

- [agent-card.json](agent-card.json): machine-readable capability and trust manifest
- [extras/reflex.py](extras/reflex.py): optional local autocomplete stand-in
- [extras/conductor_driver.py](extras/conductor_driver.py): scripted-human test harness
- [session-logs/](session-logs/): unedited transcripts of the live test
